entities.name: smṛti
entities.cite: Smrti texts are prakalpita, framed or constructed, by the veda-vid on the basis of linga

entities.name: veda
entities.cite: Smrti texts are prakalpita, framed or constructed, by the veda-vid on the basis of linga — inferential marks within the Veda itself

entities.name: liṅga
entities.cite: inferential marks within the Veda itself

entities.name: vedavid
entities.cite: by the veda-vid on the basis of linga

axioms.name: prakalpita
axioms.cite: Smrti texts are prakalpita, framed or constructed, by the veda-vid on the basis of linga — inferential marks within the Veda itself

axioms.name: paratantra
axioms.cite: The authority of the secondary literature is made derivative

axioms.name: asritya
axioms.cite: it subordinates the whole derivative tradition to the one Word

axioms.name: ubhayaprayojana
axioms.cite: The distinction between drsta and adrsta purposes, seen and unseen — that is, empirically evident aims versus those whose fruit is transcendent

claims.name: prakalpita
claims.cite: were framed by those who know the Veda from indicatory marks

claims.name: paratantra
claims.cite: The smrtis, various in form and having both seen and unseen purposes

rejected_readings.label: smrti_as_independent
rejected_readings.rendering: The smritis are authoritative texts composed independently, with both seen and unseen purposes.
rejected_readings.why: Asserts independence (svatantra) for smritis, which the commentary explicitly denies. They are derivative (paratantra) and rest upon the Veda alone. Treating smrti as an independent authority contradicts the denial.

rejected_readings.label: smrti_source_empirical
rejected_readings.rendering: The smritis were framed by learned scholars directly from observation of the world, not from Vedic inference.
rejected_readings.why: Asserts that smrtis derive from empirical sources rather than from Vedic linga (inferential marks). The commentary explicitly states they are prakalpita on the basis of linga within the Veda itself.

notes: Verse 1.7 establishes the hierarchical epistemology by making smritis derivative from Veda. The relation between prakalpita (framing by vedavids) and asritya (resting upon) captures the dual dependence. The ontology fits: veda as absolute, smrti/linga/prayojana as properties, vedavid as the cognizing power.
